chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1365 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Mr. Ghulam Umar S.M Rajput, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Nouman Fareed Shaikh, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 4. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for respondents No.1 to 4, files para-wise comments on behalf of respondent No.1 to 4, which are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. Counsel for respondents submits that petitioner has not approached respondent No.4 and if he does so along with relevant documentary evidence, his grievance will be redressed. On such statement, learned counsel for petitioner seeks disposal of instant petition and undertakes that the petitioner will approach respondent No.4. Accordingly, the instant petition is disposed of with directions to the respondent No.4 to decide the petitioner’s case within thirty days, from the date of such approach. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
